8.caption:
🟢Attention all new users🟢
📌 After order confirmation, you need to upload a screenshot of the payment.
A 10-minute countdown will be displayed at the top of the page. Please lock your order before the countdown ends. After locking the order, please immediately capture and upload your payment proof. After uploading, please click the "Submit" button below. Only then will your order be considered successfully locked. ✅
✅ If the payment was successful, please upload this screenshot.
⏳ If the payment status changes to "Pending", please take a screenshot of the pending status and upload the screenshot.
🧾 After that, you will receive a UTR number, which you must submit correctly.
⚠️ Your order will not be considered complete if you do not submit a screenshot and UTR number.

9.text:
📢[KivoPay Official Announcement]

To ensure the safety of users' funds on the platform, we are now publishing the official contact information for KivoPay Order Verification Assistant:

📞 9708401655
📞 9691997161
📞 9128119159
All  numbers above are contact information for KivoPay's official order verification assistant.

⚠️ Besides the numbers mentioned above, any person who contacts you unsolicited, impersonates platform staff, customer service, order reviewers, or financial personnel, is a scammer. Do not trust them, and never disclose your account information, verification codes, or transfer any money to them.

When you receive messages or calls from the above official numbers, please cooperate actively in order verification and maintain polite and courteous communication to jointly safeguard a positive platform service environment.

If you have any doubts, please verify through official channels to avoid being scammed.

KivoPay Operations Center
